asset_name: Elemental mastery beams, shells, and impact VFX
notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. Deferred QA must check whether checkerboard is baked and whether real alpha cleanup is needed. Deferred transparency QA (2026-05-08): alpha-sensitive candidate is RGB/no real alpha in probe samples; cleanup is required before review or integration gates can reopen.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mastery VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate VFX sprite sheet for elemental mastery beams, shells, and impact feedback.
Subject: twelve small VFX sprites in a 4x3 sheet: fire beam, ice beam, earth beam, heart heal beam, armor shell, gold sparkle beam, hit impact, heal impact, shield pulse, coin burst, mastery charge ring, small trail particle.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability, transparent-style cutouts.
Composition/framing: 4x3 sheet, effects centered with padding, no labels.
Lighting/mood: clear source-to-target magic feedback without covering the board.
Color palette: elemental colors, white highlights, gold accents.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid opaque full backgrounds.
